designs.name: AI Company Landing Page
designs.shortDescription: A futuristic, animated landing page for a next-gen AI company, featuring a dynamic hero section, interactive service showcases, and a sleek design.
designs.longDescription:
## AI Company Landing Page

A modern and sleek landing page designed for an AI-focused company. It uses animations and a clean layout to present the company's services and vision.

### Features

- Dynamic hero section with animated text and graphics.
- Interactive cards for showcasing AI services.
- Responsive design that works on all devices.
- Smooth scroll animations and hover effects.
- Dark/light mode support.

designs.name: Chat Interface
designs.shortDescription: A modern messaging UI with conversation sidebar, message bubbles, typing indicator, and read receipts.
designs.longDescription:
## Chat Interface

A polished messaging UI built for the Design System pillar. Simulates a real chat app experience with conversation switching and demo message sending.

### Features

- Conversation list sidebar with avatars, last message preview, and timestamps
- Online/offline status dots on avatars
- Message bubbles with different styling for sent vs received
- Animated typing indicator that fires after sending a message
- Emoji picker for quick message composition
- Message timestamps and read receipts
- Full dark/light mode support
- Responsive layout — sidebar collapses into an overlay on mobile

designs.name: Checkout Flow / Payment Page
designs.shortDescription: A premium multi-step checkout flow with cart review, shipping, payment, and confirmation, featuring a live animated credit card preview.
designs.longDescription:
## Checkout Flow / Payment Page

A polished, production-ready 4-step checkout experience built with vanilla JavaScript and CSS. Guides the user through Cart Review, Shipping, Payment, and Confirmation with validation gating each step.

### Features

- Animated step indicator with progress fill and checkmarks for completed steps
- Cart review with quantity steppers and item removal
- Shipping form with saved-address quick-select chips and floating labels
- Live animated credit card preview that updates in real time as the user types
- Automatic card brand detection (Visa, Mastercard, Amex) from the card number
- Promo code input with live discount calculation
- Persistent order summary sidebar across all steps
- Animated SVG success checkmark and order confirmation screen
- Full dark/light mode support
- Fully responsive, single-column layout on mobile

designs.name: Command Palette
designs.shortDescription: A keyboard-first, VS Code / Spotlight-style command overlay with fuzzy search, grouped results, smooth animations, and dark/light mode.
designs.longDescription:
## Command Palette

A keyboard-first command palette overlay inspired by VS Code and macOS Spotlight. Built with Tailwind CSS and vanilla JavaScript.

### Features

- **Cmd+K / Ctrl+K** shortcut to open, Escape to close
- **Grouped results**: Pages, Actions, Settings, Recent — each with icon, title, description
- **Arrow key navigation** with highlighted active result and Enter to select
- **Fuzzy-ish text matching** with highlighted matching characters
- **Smooth open/close animation** (scale + fade) with backdrop blur overlay
- **ShadCN-inspired clean styling** with brand indigo accent colors
- **Dark/light mode** toggle with localStorage persistence
- **Toast notifications** on command execution

designs.name: Data Table — Sorting & Filters
designs.shortDescription: A responsive data table with vanilla JS sorting, search, status/plan filters, pagination, and row selection with bulk actions.
designs.longDescription:
## Data Table — Sorting & Filters

A ShadCN/UI-inspired, production-friendly data table UI demo built with Tailwind CSS CDN and vanilla JavaScript. It supports column sorting (with a cycle: none → asc → desc → none), global search, status and plan filters, per-column status filtering, pagination, and selectable rows with a bulk actions toolbar.

### Features

- Sorting on column headers (name, email, plan, status, created date)
- Search by name or email
- Filters:
  - Global status filter
  - Plan dropdown filter
  - Status filter inside the Status column header
- Pagination with page number windowing
- Row selection with select-all (including indeterminate state)
- Bulk actions: mark selected rows active/inactive and clear selection
- Dark/light mode toggle with preference saved to localStorage
- Responsive layout with horizontal scroll on small screens

designs.name: Design System File Manager
designs.shortDescription: A professional macOS/Windows-style file explorer interface featuring nested folder trees, dual view modes, and interactive file management operations.
designs.longDescription:
## Design System File Manager

A robust, desktop-class file management interface built for administrative dashboards. Organize, traverse, and manipulate file system structures with an intuitive, high-fidelity UI that mimics professional operating system explorers.

### Features

- **Nested Folder Tree**: A fully recursive sidebar navigation system with collapsible branch nodes and depth-aware indentation.
- **Dual View Modes**: Seamlessly toggle between a dense list view for detailed metadata and a spacious grid view for visual asset browsing.
- **Interactive Toolbar**: Complete with breadcrumb navigation, real-time search filtering, sorting primitives, and utility actions like creating new directory nodes.
- **ContextMenu & Interaction**: Custom-built right-click overlay system providing Rename, Delete, Copy, and Paste lifecycle hooks.
- **Metadata Visualization**: Explicit tracking of file size, last-modified timestamps, and distinct iconography categorized by file extension type.
- **State Management**: Supports persistent selected states, multi-select selection zones, and system-aware dark/light mode rendering.
- **Responsive Architecture**: Gracefully collapses sidebar components into modular overlays on mobile, ensuring a functional file system view at any screen size.

designs.name: Design System Kanban Board
designs.shortDescription: A professional Trello/Jira-style task management canvas featuring seamless drag-and-drop column lanes, rich task telemetry, and interactive issue composition.
designs.longDescription:
## Design System Kanban Board

An administrative workflow tracking panel designed for agile governance within digital product groups. Organize, assign, and shuffle design tokens, component tickets, and documentation priorities across dynamic progress states.

### Features

- **Fluid Drag-and-Drop Operations**: Seamless card movement between To Do, In Progress, and Done lanes, powered by a native SortableJS configuration with smooth animation paths.
- **Rich Telemetry Task Cards**: Clear visualization of task names, contextual assignee avatar iconography, explicit priority indicators (High, Medium, Low), and targeted deadline tracking badges.
- **Modal Composition Portal**: An interactive popup dialogue system equipped with structured input forms to generate and dispatch production tasks live to the tracking columns.
- **Dynamic Status Metrics**: Live counter badges mapped directly to headers that compute and update row volume indices automatically upon card placement.
- **Responsive Column Reflow**: Flexibly transforms multi-column desktop matrix grids into clean, vertically stacked task flows on narrow mobile viewports.
- **Atmospheric Interface Contexts**: Complete dark and light UI layouts using system themes for enhanced readability during long planning operations.

designs.name: Design System SaaS Landing
designs.shortDescription: A conversion-ready SaaS landing page for Design System workflows with theme toggle, pricing switch, and accessible FAQ.
designs.longDescription:
## Design System SaaS Landing

A single-file SaaS landing experience for the Design System pillar. Includes conversion-focused sections (hero, features, workflow walkthrough, testimonials, pricing, FAQ), a persistent light/dark theme toggle, monthly/annual pricing switching, smooth scrolling, and an accessible accordion interaction.

designs.name: Folio Mail
designs.shortDescription: A responsive email client interface with folders, search, compose modal, and reading pane.
designs.longDescription: A modern email client UI featuring inbox management, searchable email lists, folder navigation, reading pane, compose modal, dark/light mode, bulk selection, inline reply, responsive mobile layout, and realistic sample emails built with Tailwind CSS and vanilla JavaScript.

designs.name: Invoice / Receipt Builder
designs.shortDescription: A professional invoice and receipt builder with custom branding, real-time calculations, dark/light settings, and image download.
designs.longDescription:
## Invoice / Receipt Builder

An interactive billing tool for design systems. Build customizable receipts and invoices using instant forms and watch results update in a print-ready document preview.

### Features

- **Interactive Form Inputs**: Fields for company name, contact information, billing target, currency, invoice reference, and date details.
- **Dynamic Calculations**: Real-time line item adding/deleting with automatic item row updates, taxable balance math, custom flat/percentage discounts, shipping, and remaining balance tracking.
- **Design Presets**: Multiple accent brand colors (Indigo, Emerald, Ruby, Amber, Slate) and custom font settings (Modern Sans, Elegant Serif, Systems Monospace).
- **Logo Branding**: Switch between standard design system preset SVGs or upload a custom company logo as a base64 image.
- **Paid Stamp**: Renders a bold "PAID" stamp on the invoice when the remaining balance due reaches zero.
- **A4 Print Friendly**: Built-in print media queries to print only the document page, formatted perfectly to A4 specifications.
- **One-click PNG Download**: High-definition download using html2canvas directly onto local storage.

designs.name: Login & Registration Form
designs.shortDescription: A polished authentication interface featuring login and registration forms, password strength, inline validation, dark mode, and responsive layouts.
designs.longDescription:
## Login & Registration Forms

A premium authentication interface designed for modern web applications. This Design System component showcases responsive login and registration experiences with polished UI, accessibility, and interactive form behaviors.

### Features

- **Dual Authentication Forms**: Login and registration forms with an intuitive tab-based interface.
- **Interactive Validation**: Real-time inline validation with contextual error messages and accessible feedback.
- **Password Experience**: Password visibility toggle, live strength indicator, confirmation validation, and requirement checklist.
- **Authentication Controls**: Remember Me option, Forgot Password link, Terms & Conditions agreement, and social login buttons for Google, GitHub, and Apple (UI only).
- **Modern User Experience**: Loading button states, animated toast notifications, smooth transitions, and polished micro-interactions.
- **Dark & Light Mode**: Theme toggle with persistent user preference using localStorage.
- **Responsive & Accessible**: Mobile-first responsive layout with semantic HTML, keyboard navigation, ARIA support, and WCAG-friendly color contrast.

designs.name: Portfolio Dashboard
designs.shortDescription: A responsive personal portfolio with retro-inspired UI, animated sections, skill visualizations, and dark mode.
designs.longDescription: A modern personal portfolio website featuring an animated hero section with typing effect, oscilloscope canvas animation, responsive navigation, dark/light theme toggle, animated skill progress bars, project showcase, experience timeline, contact form validation, and a retro hardware-inspired interface built with Tailwind CSS, HTML5 Canvas, and vanilla JavaScript.

designs.name: Premium E-Commerce Product Page
designs.shortDescription: Build a premium and fully responsive product detail page featuring image galleries, product variants, tabbed content and dark/light mode support.
designs.longDescription: Create a modern e-commerce product page using Tailwind CSS and Vanilla JavaScript. The page includes an interactive image gallery with thumbnail navigation, product pricing with discounts, ratings, size and color selectors, quantity picker, add-to-cart functionality, tabbed sections for descriptions, specifications and reviews, related product recommendations, optional sticky add-to-cart bar and complete dark/light theme support. The design should be fully responsive across devices and follow modern UI/UX practices.

designs.name: Premium Multi-Step Checkout
designs.shortDescription: A polished multi-step checkout flow with cart review, shipping form validation, payment UI demo, and confirmation screen.
designs.longDescription:
## Premium Multi-Step Checkout

A premium multi-step checkout experience designed for modern e-commerce flows...

designs.name: Pricing Table
designs.shortDescription: A responsive 3-tier pricing table with a monthly/annual billing toggle.
designs.longDescription:
## Pricing Table

A clean, responsive pricing component with three tiers and a highlighted popular plan.

### Features

- Starter / Pro / Enterprise tiers
- Feature checklist per tier
- Monthly/annual toggle with live price updates
- Dark/light mode support

designs.name: Product Search Dropdown
designs.shortDescription: A searchable product dropdown with category filters, keyboard navigation, and pastel cream styling.
designs.longDescription:
## Product Search Dropdown

A polished, interactive search dropdown component built with Tailwind CSS. Features real-time filtering, category pill selectors, keyboard navigation, and a warm pastel cream aesthetic.

### Features

- Real-time search with text highlight on matching terms
- Category filter pills (All, Phones, Laptops, Audio, Wearables, Accessories)
- Keyboard navigation (Arrow Up/Down, Enter to select, Escape to clear)
- Product detail card on selection with rating and stock status
- Stock availability badges (In Stock / Out of Stock)
- Smooth dropdown animation and hover transitions
- Dark/light mode toggle with localStorage persistence
- Pastel cream color palette in light mode, warm stone in dark mode
- Fully responsive

designs.name: SaaS Analytics Dashboard
designs.shortDescription: A premium analytics dashboard with revenue charts, stats cards, traffic breakdown, and activity feed.
designs.longDescription:
## SaaS Analytics Dashboard

A polished, production-grade SaaS analytics dashboard built with Tailwind CSS and Chart.js. Features a responsive sidebar navigation, interactive revenue and traffic charts, stats cards with trend indicators, a transaction table, and a real-time activity feed.

### Features

- Collapsible sidebar navigation with mobile hamburger menu
- Four KPI stat cards with trend badges (up/down arrows)
- Revenue overview line chart comparing this year vs. last year
- Doughnut chart showing traffic source breakdown
- Recent transactions table with avatars and status badges
- Activity feed with color-coded event icons
- Dark/light mode toggle with localStorage persistence
- Fully responsive — works at 320px through ultrawide
- Sticky header with search bar and notification bell
- Period selector (7/30/90 days, 1 year)

designs.name: Scheduling Calendar
designs.shortDescription: A scheduling calendar with month navigation, day selection, and an event sidebar for adding/deleting events.
designs.longDescription:
## Scheduling Calendar

A standalone scheduling calendar UI demo built with Vanilla JavaScript and Bootstrap 5. It provides a responsive month grid, a mobile-friendly events sidebar/panel, and in-memory event storage for quick interaction.

### Features

- Month navigation (previous/next) and Today shortcut
- 7x6 month grid with day cells
- Click a day to open/sync an events sidebar
- Add events (title, time, category) and delete events
- Category-based color indicators on each day cell
- Mini month/year picker for quick navigation
- Dark/light mode toggle with CSS variable theming
- Responsive behavior: sidebar behaves as a slide-up panel on small screens

designs.name: Settings Panel
designs.shortDescription: A polished settings experience with responsive tabs, theme controls, toggles, and toast feedback in a ShadCN-inspired layout.
designs.longDescription:
## Settings Panel

A clean, modern settings page for the Design System pillar. It features grouped preference sections, a responsive sidebar that becomes a dropdown on mobile, light/dark/system theme handling, accent color selection, toggle switches, and a toast confirmation on save.

### Features

- Sidebar tabs for Profile, Notifications, Appearance, Security, and Billing
- Profile section with avatar upload, name and email fields, and save action
- Notification toggles for update preferences
- Theme selector and accent color picker
- Security section with password inputs and 2FA toggle
- Responsive layout with a mobile-friendly tab dropdown
- Dark/light mode and smooth ShadCN-inspired styling

designs.name: Social Media Feed
designs.shortDescription: A Twitter/X-style design-system feed with composer, threaded reply preview, interactive post actions, trending, and dark/light mode.
designs.longDescription:
## Social Media Feed

A polished social feed layout designed for the Design System pillar...

designs.name: Toast Notifications
designs.shortDescription: Stackable success, error, warning, and info toasts with auto-dismiss, offline.
designs.longDescription: A self-contained toast notification component that runs entirely in your browser. Trigger success, error, warning, or info toasts and watch them slide in top-right, stack without overlapping, and auto-dismiss on a countdown you can pause on hover or close by hand. Includes light/dark theme support that follows your system preference, a full-width mobile layout, and demo buttons to fire one or all four types at once — all with zero dependencies and no data ever leaving your machine.

designs.name: User Profile Card
designs.shortDescription: A premium user profile card with a mesh-gradient avatar, social links, stats row, and Follow/Message actions.
designs.longDescription:
## User Profile Card

A polished profile card component for the Design System pillar, built with Tailwind CSS. Features a mesh-gradient avatar placeholder standing in for a photo, a waveform-motif divider, and a full stats/social/action layout.

### Features

- Large avatar area with a mesh-gradient placeholder (no external image required) and a live-status indicator
- Name, professional title, and short bio
- Social links row with GitHub, X (Twitter), and LinkedIn icons (icon-only, non-functional)
- Stats row for Posts, Followers, and Following
- Follow (with toggle state) and Message action buttons with polished hover/focus states
- Dark/light mode toggle with localStorage persistence
- Fully responsive from 320px to desktop
- Semantic HTML, keyboard-accessible, visible focus rings, and prefers-reduced-motion support

designs.name: Wavelength Player
designs.shortDescription: A responsive music player interface with playlists, search, queue, and playback controls.
designs.longDescription: A modern music streaming interface featuring playlist browsing, artist pages, search, liked songs, playback controls, queue management, vinyl-inspired animations, dark/light mode, responsive design, and interactive audio player UI built with Tailwind CSS and vanilla JavaScript.

designs.name: Weather Instrument Panel
designs.shortDescription: A responsive weather dashboard with forecasts, AQI, charts, and animated weather icons.
designs.longDescription: A modern weather dashboard featuring a current weather hero, 7-day forecast, hourly temperature chart, weather details, AQI gauge, radar placeholder, dummy location search, dark/light mode, and responsive layouts built with Tailwind CSS and Chart.js.
